case_title: YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. VS DEJEAN, DEBORAH ANN

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DEJEAN, DEBORAH ANN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-19-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
